channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Saturday, May 23, 2026
item.description: Two threads dominate today that connect directly to your work, Midya. Google's new omni-modal AI model and OpenAI's move into advertising signal that the AI-in-marketing landscape is accelerating faster than most brands are ready for — your consulting positioning as an AI-marketi...
